Article Title: How to get your CIBIL credit score without a PAN card
Article Text:
Your credit score is a three-digit number that reflects your creditworthiness and repayment capacity.

What is a CIBIL score?

How to get your CIBIL Credit score without a PAN Card

Factors affecting your CIBIL score

CIBIL credit score : Understanding your creditworthiness is pivotal in today's financial landscape, especially when seeking loans or credit cards. The Credit Information Bureau (India) Limited, commonly known as CIBIL, plays an important role in this regard by providing credit scores to borrowers.According to ET, credit score helps banks make informed decisions about extending credit cards and loans. Your credit history influences your CIBIL score , which is calculated using a special method.Your CIBIL score is a three-digit number that reflects your creditworthiness and repayment capacity. Ranging from 300 to 900, a higher score indicates a stronger likelihood of loan approval. Banks and financial institutions use this score to assess the risk associated with lending money.1. Go to the official CIBIL website and click on 'Personal CIBIL score,' then 'Get Your Free CIBIL score.' Follow the link provided and fill in all the required details.2. If you don’t have a PAN Card, you can use an alternative identification such as Passport, Voter ID, Driver’s License, or Ration Card. Enter the number of the chosen ID.3. Provide your date of birth, PIN code, and select your state. Finally, enter your mobile number and click on ‘Accept and Continue’.4. Authenticate your identity by entering the OTP (One-Time Password) delivered to your mobile device on the next screen. Click 'Continue' to proceed.5. Choose whether you want to link the device with your account. Select 'Yes' or 'No' based on your preference.6. Upon successful registration, you will see a page confirming that 'You have successfully registered!'7. Click on ‘Go to Dashboard’ to access and view your CIBIL score.The factors influencing the new CIBIL score, as stated on the CIBIL website, include:1. Depth of credit: This refers to the duration of your existing credit history, calculated from the opening date of your oldest credit account.2. Long-term trend of outstanding balances: The overall trend of outstanding balances over time affects your score.3. Transaction history on credit cards: How you manage transactions on your credit cards impacts your score.4. Ratio of actual repayment amount to total amount due: This ratio indicates your repayment behavior and influences your score accordingly.5. Number of new accounts opened and number of accounts closed: Opening or closing accounts can affect your score, so managing these actions wisely is important.
Article Summary: Your CIBIL score is a three-digit number that reflects your creditworthiness and repayment capacity. Ranging from 300 to 900, a higher score indicates a stronger likelihood of loan approval. Banks and financial institutions use this score to assess the risk associated with lending money.

Article Title: Making waves underground: India's first undersea rail tunnel takes shape
Article Text:
One of India's biggest tunnel boring machines



A 39-metre-deep launch shaft



Safety systems and waterproof design



India's first undersea rail tunnel has moved a step closer to reality, with a giant Tunnel Boring Machine (TBM) beginning its journey beneath Thane Creek on Saturday for the Mumbai–Ahmedabad Bullet Train Project.The launch of the second machine marks the start of excavation on the 7-km undersea stretch, the first of its kind for any rail corridor in the country. The second TBM has started tunnelling from Sawli (Ghansoli) towards Vikhroli in Maharashtra. The undersea section forms part of a 10-km tunnel drive, with 7 km running below Thane Creek.The Mumbai–Ahmedabad Bullet Train Project includes a 21-km underground tunnel, of which 16 km between Sawli (Ghansoli) and Bandra Kurla Complex (BKC) will be excavated using Tunnel Boring Machines. Work is already underway on another stretch after the first TBM began its 6-km drive from Vikhroli towards BKC on July 5, 2026. The remaining 5 km of the underground section has already been completed using the New Austrian Tunnelling Method (NATM).Designed for challenging ground conditions, the newly deployed machine is among the largest Tunnel Boring Machines ever used for rail tunnel construction in India. Its cutterhead measures 13.6 metres across—roughly the height of a four-storey building, while the machine weighs 3,200 tonnes, equivalent to around 500 Asian elephants.Stretching 96 metres in length, it is almost as long as a football pitch.The TBM is equipped with a cutterhead, main bearing, jaw crusher, erector, main shield, tail shield and four specialised gantries that support tunnelling operations. Configured as a Mixshield-type, semi-automatic, slurry-based machine, it uses a pressurised bentonite slurry circuit to stabilise the tunnel face during excavation. The technology has been selected for the Mumbai suburban section because it offers better control over ground settlement while minimising disruption on the surface.It also features a Semi-Continuous Advance (SCA) system, allowing tunnel excavation and segment ring installation to take place simultaneously. This enables faster progress while maintaining safety during construction.Launching the machine required the construction of a 39-metre-deep shaft at Sawli, nearly the depth of a 12-storey building below ground level. Since there was limited space inside the shaft, the TBM was lowered in separate sections. The gantries were placed first and pushed into the already completed NATM tunnel, followed by the main shield and cutterhead.Behind the machine, four double-storey backup gantries, each measuring about 18 to 20 metres, carry systems such as the roller crusher, slurry pumps, hydraulic equipment, operator cabin, grouting systems, power units, emergency refuge chambers, workshop area, cable trays and hose reels.The TBM is fitted with a real-time multi-gas monitoring system to detect methane, oxygen, carbon monoxide and carbon dioxide. Fire safety measures include automatic fire detection and extinguishing systems, a safety water curtain and an active sprinkler network along the designated escape route.The launch shaft is supported by infrastructure including a water treatment plant, slurry treatment plant, bentonite storage tanks, a dedicated power substation, backup generators, a ready-mix concrete plant for grouting, a slurry transport system, a sewage treatment plant and other logistics facilities.The project also incorporates a real-time monitoring system to track ground movement and protect nearby structures. Instruments such as Surface Settlement Points, Optical Displacement Sensors, Tilt Meters, Bi-Reflective Targets, strain gauges and seismographs are being used throughout the excavation.The tunnel being excavated using TBMs is designed as a fully waterproof structure. Continuous monitoring systems will track structural performance, groundwater behaviour and overall construction safety. To prevent water ingress, the tunnel lining will use double-layer Ethylene Propylene Diene Monomer (EPDM) gaskets along with hydrophilic seals to ensure long-term durability and safety.
Article Summary: The Mumbai–Ahmedabad Bullet Train Project includes a 21-km underground tunnel, of which 16 km will be excavated using Tunnel Boring Machines. The second TBM has started tunnelling from Sawli (Ghansoli) towards Vikhroli in Maharashtra. The undersea section forms part of a 10-km tunnel drive, with 7 km running below Thane Creek.

Article Title: IRCTC's new website goes live: How it makes ticket booking easier for consumers
Article Text:
What changes for passengers?

Cleaner interface: The new website removes unnecessary captchas, pop-ups, flashing graphics and other distracting elements for a simpler booking experience.

The new website removes unnecessary captchas, pop-ups, flashing graphics and other distracting elements for a simpler booking experience. Seat availability in one view: Travellers can now check seat availability across all classes from a single screen instead of viewing each class separately.

Travellers can now check seat availability across all classes from a single screen instead of viewing each class separately. Faster checkout: The booking process has been shortened by reducing the number of steps needed to complete a ticket purchase.

The booking process has been shortened by reducing the number of steps needed to complete a ticket purchase. Quicker repeat bookings: Passenger details will be saved, making future bookings faster and more convenient.



IRCTC's new beta website: Fewer clicks, faster process — your next ticket booking on IRCTC just got easier! The ministry of railways has unveiled a beta version of its revamped website, featuring a cleaner interface, faster checkout and saved passenger details for repeat bookings.The beta version of the Indian railway catering and tourism corporation (IRCTC) website was launched at 2100 hrs on Wednesday. A link to the new portal has also been added to the homepage of the existing IRCTC website.The ministry has asked users to try the platform and share feedback before the final version is rolled out.The redesign was shaped with inputs from students of the Malaviya National Institute of Technology (MNIT), Jaipur, who suggested improvements to the website's look and feel during an interaction with railway minister Ashwini Vaishnaw. The students were made part of the design process, and their feedback was used to prepare the portal for public trial.The ministry said the beta release is intended to collect user feedback, which will be used to make further improvements before the website is fully rolled out.Passengers can share suggestions on the simplified features, and these may be incorporated into future releases to improve customer satisfaction.The IRCTC website, first launched in 2002, currently handles an average of around 14.5 lakh ticket bookings every day. According to the ministry, the website has received several complaints over the years regarding its functioning and features, prompting the redesign.The revamped portal will also be integrated with the new Passenger Reservation Engine, which is being upgraded in parallel. The reservation system, which powers various train booking applications, has undergone extensive revamp work while remaining operational throughout the upgrade process.The ministry said the new Passenger Reservation Engine will be launched very soon, and the fully functional new IRCTC portal integrated with it is expected to be available in a few weeks.Users have been requested to explore the beta website and provide suggestions that can help further improve the platform before its full launch.
Article Summary: The beta version of the Indian railway catering and tourism corporation (IRCTC) website was launched at 2100 hrs on Wednesday. Travellers can now check seat availability across all classes from a single screen instead of viewing each class separately. The booking process has been shortened by reducing the number of steps needed to complete a ticket purchase.

Article Title: Elon Musk responds as user who shares frustration with Tesla Self-Driving getting stuck in slower traffic, says: Car will start remembering your ...
Article Text:
Tesla user complains about the EV leaving faster lanes

Elon Musk says Tesla will learn from driver behavior

Tesla CEO Elon Musk has said the company's Full Self-Driving (FSD) system will soon begin remembering each driver's individual preferences. Elon Musk’s remarks come after a user complained that the software keeps leaving carpool and express lanes before getting stuck in slower traffic. Musk said the vehicle will learn from a driver's manual interventions and adjust its behavior over time, suggesting future versions of Tesla's self-driving software will become more personalized.The discussion started after X (formerly Twitter) user Whole Mars Catalog (@WholeMarsBlog) shared a post describing a common frustration while using Tesla's Full Self-Driving system."One thing that really frustrates me is when Tesla Self-Driving exits the carpool lane or express lane and then gets stuck in traffic," the user wrote. "As I see everyone else whizzing by in the far left lane, I get extremely annoyed knowing I should be there too."The user ended the post by asking Tesla's software to respect driver settings, writing, "Respect the settings please...."Responding to the post, Elon Musk said Tesla is working on a feature that will allow the car to adapt to individual driving preferences."The car will start to remember your specific interventions and match each person's individual preferences," Musk wrote on X.His comment suggests that future updates to Tesla's Full Self-Driving software will learn from the times drivers manually override the system, allowing the vehicle to make decisions that better match each owner's driving style.
Article Summary: Elon Musk says Tesla will learn from driver behavior. Tesla CEO said the company's Full Self-Driving system will soon begin remembering each driver's individual preferences. Musk's remarks come after a user complained that the software keeps leaving carpool and express lanes before getting stuck in slower traffic.

Article Title: Philips unite LED transforms Leer’s council chambers with 135-inch display
Article Text: PPDS, the exclusive global provider of Philips Professional Displays, has announced that the Philips Unite LED 6000 Series All In One solution has been installed at the municipal government offices in Leer, Germany. The 135-inch display is designed to elevate presentations, council sessions, and hybrid collaboration, delivering a high-performance visual experience for local government operations.The Leer Municipal team, based in the historic Rathaus, sought to modernize its central meeting room with a solution that combined reliability, usability, and sustainability. After extensive evaluations, the Philips Unite LED 6000 Series was selected for its outstanding image quality, energy efficiency, and ease of installation.With Full HD resolution, 900 cd/m² brightness, and a fine 1.5mm pixel pitch, the display ensures crystal-clear visuals even in bright environments. Numbers, charts, and detailed documents are presented with exceptional clarity, enhancing transparency and efficiency in council work.The Unite LED solution offers rich color depth, wide viewing angles, and durable design, making it ideal for demanding municipal spaces.Connectivity options include HDMI, DisplayPort, USB-C, and audio, while the integrated media player and wall mounting system simplify deployment. Supporting Leer’s sustainability goals, the display consumes less energy than comparable models, with just 0.5 watts in ultra-low standby mode. This reduces operational costs and environmental impact, aligning with long-term efficiency targets.The installation, managed by LS IT & Media, also integrates a professional AVer PTZ camera, Sennheiser TeamConnect Ceiling microphones, a conferencing PC, and Dante audio technology. Together, these components deliver seamless hybrid meeting support, clear voice capture without table microphones, and advanced features such as recording and AI-powered transcription via tucan.ai.Eckhard Groen of LS IT & Media said: “With the Philips 135” Unite LED wall as the visual centrepiece, a modern, high-performance meeting room was created that sets new standards for the Leer Municipal committee work. The high-quality image, combined with professional audio and video technology, enables efficient, transparent, and contemporary council work.”
Article Summary: Philips Unite LED 6000 Series All In One solution has been installed at the municipal government offices in Leer, Germany. The 135-inch display is designed to elevate presentations, council sessions, and hybrid collaboration. The display consumes less energy than comparable models, with just 0.5 watts in ultra-low standby mode.

Article Title: Myntra deploys AI to transform shopping, seller growth, and supply chains
Article Text: Fashion e-commerce platform Myntra has announced a sweeping expansion of its AI capabilities across customer experience, seller enablement, and operational efficiency. The rollout is designed to compress timelines, improve personalization, and accelerate innovation, with measurable gains already visible across the platform.Myntra’s AI-led Contextual Styling Suite now offers real-time look pairings, helping shoppers style complete outfits. Its Size and Fit Intelligence layer covers 85% of eligible apparel, delivering recommendations in under two seconds and explaining why a size works for a shopper. Fit visualisation across body types is being scaled up.The platform’s Active Matrix Display supports creator-led discovery, validating catalog content and routing complex reviews to specialist teams. Today, 90% of monthly active users experience personalised search, reinforcing Myntra’s position as a leader in AI-driven fashion discovery.AI has cut seller onboarding from 10–15 days to under 2, with registration completing within minutes. The Seller Growth Hub provides daily guidance for new sellers, while advanced dashboards and trend insights support scaling brands.Complementing this, Saarthi, Myntra’s AI-led voice intelligence platform, automates partner communications and manages high-volume queries, freeing human teams to focus on complex issues.Myntra’s cataloging infrastructure now produces 400–600 dynamic product videos daily, reducing turnaround from 1 day to 4 hours. Its compliance protocol, Scout, ensures quality guardrails before listings go live.Internally, BIRA (Business Intelligence Retrieval Agent) allows teams to run complex queries in everyday language, cutting workflows from days to minutes. AI has also driven a 40% increase in feature rollout velocity, handling routine testing and diagnostics while engineers focus on architecture.At the supply chain level, simulations that once took 2 days now run in 1 hour. Meanwhile, Meera, Myntra’s conversational support layer, resolves over 30% of standard customer queries, enabling human agents to focus on nuanced cases.Sharon Pais, Head of Myntra, said: “Technology has always been at the core of every journey on Myntra. Our focus remains on strengthening capabilities that give brand partners clear pathways to scale while continuing to make the shopping experience more relevant and confident for customers. For us, AI is not just a layer we have added on top, it sits at the heart of how Myntra operates.”With AI now embedded across discovery, onboarding, and product development, Myntra is positioning itself as a tech-first fashion platform, reshaping how customers shop and how sellers grow. The company’s deep integration of AI into everyday workflows signals a future where fashion e-commerce is faster, more personalised, and more efficient.
Article Summary: Fashion e-commerce platform Myntra has announced a sweeping expansion of its AI capabilities across customer experience, seller enablement, and operational efficiency. The rollout is designed to compress timelines, improve personalization, and accelerate innovation, with measurable gains already visible.

Article Title: Quote of the day by Sundar Pichai: AI is probably the most important thing humanity has ever worked on; I think of it as something more profound than electricity or fire
Article Text:
Google CEO Sundar Pichai



AI already powers everyday Google services

Google CEO Sundar Pichai once said that artificial intelligence (AI) will have a bigger impact on humanity than some of history's greatest inventions. Speaking at a town hall event in 2019, Sundar Pichai said AI is "probably the most important thing humanity has ever worked on" and described it as being "more profound than electricity or fire. " During the discussion, Pichai said AI has the potential to transform society in ways that go beyond earlier technological breakthroughs."AI is one of the most important things humanity is working on. It is more profound than, I dunno, electricity or fire," Pichai said.When interviewer Kara Swisher questioned the comparison, saying, "Fire? Fire is pretty good," Sundar Pichai stood by his view."Well, it kills people, too," he replied. "We have learned to harness fire for the benefits of humanity but we had to overcome its downsides too. So my point is, AI is really important, but we have to be concerned about it."Sundar Pichai then said people already use AI every day, often without realizing it. He then pointed to Google Translate, image search and Google Photos as examples of AI-powered tools used by billions of people.“AI is just making computers more intelligent and being able to do a wide variety of tasks," he said.The Google CEO also said AI could help address some of the world's biggest problems, including healthcare. “AI holds the potential for some of the biggest advances we are going to see," he said, adding that the technology could play a role in solving diseases such as cancer.At the same time, Sundar Pichai then stated that concerns about AI are valid. "It is right to be concerned, absolutely, you have to worry about it otherwise you are not going to solve it," he said.
Article Summary: Google CEO Sundar Pichai once said that artificial intelligence (AI) will have a bigger impact on humanity than some of history's greatest inventions. He said AI is "probably the most important thing humanity has ever worked on" The Google CEO also said AI could help address some of the world's biggest problems, including healthcare.

Article Title: San Francisco sends notice to Apple and Google: Remove these apps right away
Article Text:
Profiting from ‘illegal services’



Apple and Google respond to San Francisco notices



The city of San Francisco has issued a formal legal order to tech giants Apple and Google, demanding the immediate removal of dozens of ‘nudify’ apps from their digital storefronts. These controversial artificial intelligence (AI) apps allow users to digitally alter photographs to remove the clothing off the people in them. According to a report, San Francisco City Attorney David Chiu announced the action, accusing both companies of hosting, promoting and actively profiting from applications that generate non-consensual intimate deepfake – a practice that targets women and girls.“Apple and Google are profiting off apps that exploit women and girls by generating nonconsensual intimate deepfakes. While the companies cut ties with some problematic apps, Apple and Google have a responsibility to be proactive and vigilant to prevent sexual abuse,” San Francisco City Attorney David Chiu told TechCrunch.The legal notices sent by the City Attorney’s office state that Apple and Google have likely raked in “millions of dollars in fees” by processing payments for these illicit services. Under California law, it is a crime to knowingly facilitate the creation of non-consensual deepfake pornography.Furthermore, legislation passed in 2025 grants victims the right to file civil lawsuits directly against third-party facilitators, including app store operators, that help distribute or monetize this material.Citing the city's investigation, the report says that both tech giants have been “on notice” regarding their role in processing payments for these illegal purchases for nearly a year but failed to fully clean up their platforms.The letters from the City Attorney warn that Apple and Google face severe civil penalties if they do not comply, giving both corporations 28 days to coordinate directly with the city. In response to the order, both companies stated they are taking swift action against the flagged developers:Apple confirmed that ‘nudify’ apps are strictly forbidden under its guidelines. A spokesperson stated: ““We have removed three of the apps in question and are in the process of terminating their developer accounts from our program. We are in contact with four others that need to address policy violations or risk being removed as well.”Google announced that all five specific applications referenced in the city's letter have been suspended from the Google Play store.“When violations are reported to us, we investigate and take swift action, which in the case of these apps has included suspending hundreds of violating apps and restricting related search terms like ‘nudify’ on our store,” the spokesperson added.
Article Summary: San Francisco City Attorney David Chiu issued a formal legal order to tech giants Apple and Google, demanding the immediate removal of dozens of ‘nudify’ apps from their digital storefronts. The apps allow users to digitally alter photographs to remove the clothing off the people in them.

Article Title: ‘That's obviously wrong': Mick Jagger says AI can make music, but it shouldn't be used to copy the Rolling Stones
Article Text:
“You don't really want to be imitated by AI, obviously. I don't want people just putting stuff out there that can sound exactly like the Rolling Stones. I think that's obviously wrong,"

“If someone wants to make music by AI, I mean, go ahead. But it has to be original, you know. It has to be you — you have to have your own input and your own thoughts,”

AI can help, but creativity should remain human: Mick Jagger



“In a way, if you're clever, you can use that technology greatly to your advantage to make things go quicker, to make boring things go quicker,”

“In my opinion, you've got to write the songs, you have to play them, and you play them live. Of course, you can overdub, I've been doing overdub since 1965, that's not new,”

“But I mean, if you were any kind of creative person, you wouldn't do that,”

AI debate continues across the music industry



“They're not fake people in a fake room. All those drummers that you see are all real drummers, and they're all playing in a real room. The musicians are real musicians who look a bit like The Rolling Stones in 1968. The only thing was the faces,”

"soul."

“As we progress and as technology progresses, we'll have more and more tools. Hopefully, the creativity of the product continues to grow with the technology as opposed to using technology as a crutch,”

“bad actors”

“So to everyone who is gassed up about the new ways you can fake making art, by all means, drive right off that cliff. We're genuinely happy to see you go,”

Rolling Stones frontman Mick Jagger says artificial intelligence (AI) can be a useful tool for making music. Yet, he believes that the technology should not be used to imitate existing artists. Speaking to Billboard, Jagger said he opposes AI-generated songs that sound like the Rolling Stones, while supporting the technology when it is used to create original work.he added. Jagger said he does not object to AI being part of the music-making process, provided the result reflects the creator's own ideas.Jagger highlighted.Jagger described AI as another stage in the evolution of music recording technology, noting that he has seen major changes in the studio over his six-decade career.Jagger said. However, he said the creative process itself should remain with musicians.he said.Jagger also acknowledged that some people are already using AI to generate songs in the style of established artists, including the Rolling Stones.he added.Jagger's comments come after the Rolling Stones used AI in the music video for their latest single, In the Stars. Released in May, the video used AI to replace the faces of musicians portraying the band with younger versions of the Rolling Stones.Jagger said.He joins other musicians who have publicly discussed AI's role in music. In 2023, Jason Derulo said he did not view AI as a threat to musicians because lyrics generated by bots lackedDerulo noted.In May, Jack Antonoff, the lead vocalist of Bleachers and a longtime collaborator with Taylor Swift , published an open letter criticising what he described asusing AI in the creative process.Antonoff wrote in the letter.
Article Summary: Rolling Stones frontman Mick Jagger says artificial intelligence (AI) can be a useful tool for making music. Yet he believes that the technology should not be used to imitate existing artists. Jagger's comments come after the Rolling Stones used AI in the music video for their latest single, In the Stars.

Article Title: Apple overtakes Nvidia as the world's most valuable company for the first time after more than a year; how AI is the reason for Apple's gain and Nvidia's 'loss'
Article Text: Apple overtakes Nvidia as the world's most valuable company for the first time after more than a year; how AI is the reason for Apple's gain and Nvidia's 'loss'
Article Summary: Apple overtakes Nvidia as the world's most valuable company for the first time in more than a year. Apple overtakes the tech giant as the most valuable firm in the world. Apple is now worth more than $1 trillion, overtaking Nvidia. Apple's lead over Nvidia is the result of the rise of artificial intelligence, analysts say.
